lastVerifiedScope: curated public profile images, light theme profile contrast, CI release guard, live smyst.com profile image API, multilingual voice wave regression guard and worker ASR/TTS contracts

protectedProductionMode.name: Protected Production Mode
protectedProductionMode.releaseDecision: GO only when npm ci, audit, typecheck, build, preflight, smoke tests and rollback evidence are green; otherwise NO-GO
protectedProductionMode.criticalFileChangeRule: No critical production file may be changed without written approval, diff review and rollback plan.
protectedProductionMode.dataChangeRule: Do not delete or overwrite users, profiles, profile images, uploads, chats, API data structures or storage metadata without explicit destructive approval and restore evidence.
protectedProductionMode.featureChangeRule: Do not rebuild working design, routing, chat, upload, profile or security behavior without an explicit task.
protectedProductionMode.costRule: Only GitHub.com, IDrive e2, Salad.com and Spaceship DNS are production targets; legacy edge/CDN providers must not be expanded.
protectedProductionMode.fallbackRule: If an official deploy, backup, restore or live validation step cannot be proven, block release and report NO-GO.

hardArchitectureRules: GitHub.com may be used only on the Free tier
Legacy edge/CDN providers must not be used for new production work
No paid add-on service may be introduced
No service may be introduced if it can automatically create cost
Spaceship remains the DNS and domain authority
IDrive e2 remains central storage for files, media, models, backups and data
Do not delete profiles, chats, images, videos or user data without explicit destructive approval
Do not remove curated profile image files, imageFile metadata or public profile visibility without written approval
Do not weaken light theme profile text contrast without written approval and visual verification
Do not remove or weaken multilingual voice wave ASR/TTS language detection, answer-language binding, Turkish-only response protection or the 15 required voice languages without written approval
Do not perform risky migrations without explicit approval and rollback evidence
Do not change design, CSS or product behavior without a clear task
If billion-user/day scale is unrealistic on free-only limits, optimize and measure free-only instead of adding paid infrastructure

protections: metadata status update instead of blind metadata removal

deploymentProtections: IDrive e2 static artifact deploy from CI output
Salad backend deploy waits for CI and release gate
configurationProtections: check-profile-image-design-guard.py blocks missing curated profile images and light theme contrast regressions
check-voice-wave-regression.mjs protects the multilingual voice wave language map, auto-detection, answer-language binding, Turkish fallback, server ASR fallback and worker ASR/TTS contracts
check-bottom-icon-regression.mjs protects bottom chat icon actions and fallbacks
check-surface-protection.py enforces design, CSS, database, API and GitHub Actions guardrails
live-test.sh blocks noindex root and HTML fallbacks

profileImageDesignGuard.requiredCiStep: Validate curated profile images and light theme contrast
rules: Every curated public profile must have imageFile metadata.
Every curated public profile image must be a local raster image.
No curated public profile may use /api/public/twin-images SVG fallback.
Image size metadata must match the committed local file.
Light theme profile names and subtitles must keep readable contrast overrides.
liveValidation: Every live public twin must include an imageUrl.

rollbackProtections: Git revert or cherry-pick rollback path
IDrive e2 static artifact rollback path
IDrive e2 user object restore test required before release
Salad metadata restore dry-run required before release
dataIntegrityProtections: IDrive e2 object keys are user-scoped
storage downloads require KV metadata status uploaded
upload-complete verifies IDrive object via signed HEAD
curated public profiles require local raster profile images with matching size metadata
light theme profile names and subtitles require protected contrast overrides
account storage deletion marks metadata deleted
backup manifest excludes live sessions and OAuth state from restore artifacts
